scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter client dev"
scripts.dev:preview: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter client preview"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter server exec prisma migrate deploy && pnpm --filter server exec prisma generate && pnpm --filter client build
